inputs.label: Pipe Inner Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Inner diameter of the pipe. Affects flow velocity and pressure loss.

businessContext_i18n.en: Inner diameter of the pipe. Affects flow velocity and pressure loss.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Boru iç çapı. Akış hızını ve basınç kaybını etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Innendurchmesser des Rohrs. Beeinflusst Strömungsgeschwindigkeit und Druckverlust.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre intérieur du tuyau. Affecte la vitesse d'écoulement et la perte de pression.
businessContext_i18n.es: Diámetro interior de la tubería. Afecta la velocidad del flujo y la pérdida de presión.

inputs.label: Pipe Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of straight pipe segment. Pressure loss is directly proportional to length.

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of straight pipe segment. Pressure loss is directly proportional to length.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Düz boru bölümünün uzunluğu. Basınç kaybı uzunlukla doğru orantılıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Länge des geraden Rohrabschnitts. Druckverlust ist direkt proportional zur Länge.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur du segment de tuyau droit. La perte de pression est directement proportionnelle à la longueur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud del tramo recto de tubería. La pérdida de presión es directamente proporcional a la longitud.

inputs.label: Darcy Friction Factor
inputs.businessContext: Dimensionless friction factor (f) from Moody chart or Colebrook equation, depends on pipe roughness and Reynolds number.

businessContext_i18n.en: Dimensionless friction factor (f) from Moody chart or Colebrook equation, depends on pipe roughness and Reynolds number.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Moody diyagramı veya Colebrook denkleminden boyutsuz sürtünme faktörü (f), boru pürüzlülüğüne ve Reynolds sayısına bağlıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Dimensionsloser Reibungsfaktor (f) aus Moody-Diagramm oder Colebrook-Gleichung, abhängig von Rohrrauheit und Reynolds-Zahl.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de frottement sans dimension (f) issu du diagramme de Moody ou de l'équation de Colebrook, dépend de la rugosité du tuyau et du nombre de Reynolds.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de fricción adimensional (f) del diagrama de Moody o ecuación de Colebrook, depende de la rugosidad de la tubería y el número de Reynolds.

inputs.label: Fluid Density
inputs.businessContext: Mass density of the fluid (e.g., 1000 kg/m³ for water). Affects pressure loss magnitude.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass density of the fluid (e.g., 1000 kg/m³ for water). Affects pressure loss magnitude.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Akışkanın kütle yoğunluğu (örneğin su için 1000 kg/m³). Basınç kaybının büyüklüğünü etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Massendichte des Fluids (z. B. 1000 kg/m³ für Wasser). Beeinflusst die Größe des Druckverlusts.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse volumique du fluide (par exemple, 1000 kg/m³ pour l'eau). Affecte l'ampleur de la perte de pression.
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad másica del fluido (ej. 1000 kg/m³ para agua). Afecta la magnitud de la pérdida de presión.

inputs.label: Volumetric Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: Volume flow rate of the fluid. Determines velocity and hence friction losses.

businessContext_i18n.en: Volume flow rate of the fluid. Determines velocity and hence friction losses.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Akışkanın hacimsel akış hızı. Hızı ve dolayısıyla sürtünme kayıplarını belirler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Volumenstrom des Fluids. Bestimmt die Geschwindigkeit und damit die Reibungsverluste.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Débit volumique du fluide. Détermine la vitesse et donc les pertes par frottement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Caudal volumétrico del fluido. Determina la velocidad y, por tanto, las pérdidas por fricción.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
